title: Spumoni: The Rainbow Ice Cream Day
story: Every August 21, ice cream lovers celebrate National Spumoni Day by digging into this colorful Italian treat! Spumoni is like three ice cream flavors decided to have a party together in one scoop. Traditional spumoni combines pistachio, cherry, and chocolate or vanilla ice cream, often with nuts and candied fruits mixed in. Ice cream shops across America feature special spumoni flavors today, while families make their own layered versions at home. Some people post photos of their rainbow-colored scoops on social media, showing off the pretty pink, green, and brown stripes that make spumoni so Instagram-worthy!
activity_question: What are the traditional flavors found in spumoni ice cream?
activity_choices: Pistachio, cherry, and chocolate or vanilla
Cookies and cream, caramel, and fudge
Banana, peanut butter, and rainbow sherbet
activity_answer: Pistachio, cherry, and chocolate or vanilla
bonus_fact: Spumoni means "foamy" in Italian because of its light, airy texture!
